event: Sadko, wealthy merchant of Novgorod, at the docks
description: A bearded man in a long dark fur-lined coat and ornate cap stands on wooden dock planks. Behind him, workers load barrels near moored ships with tall masts. The city of Novgorod is suggested in the distant background. The illustration is rendered in muted greens and browns in a loose, sketchy style characteristic of Russian book illustration.

_meta.title: Sadko, a wealthy guest of Novgorod. Illustration for the book "Russian epic heroes"
